If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(70418) and not IsQuestCompleted(70353) and Core.Player.ClassLevel < 90
IsQuestCompleted(70353) and not IsQuestCompleted(70354) and Core.Player.ClassLevel < 90

UserDialog.DialogText: Tank Role Quest - You must be 90 to take on the next quest 'The Narwhal Beckons'

IsQuestCompleted(70356) and not IsQuestCompleted(70357) and Core.Player.ClassLevel < 96

IsQuestCompleted(70357) and not IsQuestCompleted(70358) and Core.Player.ClassLevel < 98

IsQuestCompleted(70358) and not IsQuestCompleted(70359) and Core.Player.ClassLevel < 100

UserDialog.DialogText: Tank Role Quest - You must be 100 to take on the next quest 'Dreams of a New Day'

If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(70358) and not IsQuestCompleted(70359) and Core.Player.ClassLevel > 99

UserDialog.DialogText: Please manually complete the solo duty

If.condition: IsMaimingClass() or IsScoutingClass() or IsStrikingClass() and IsQuestCompleted(70353)

UserDialog.DialogText: Melee Role Quest - You must be 90 to take on the next quest 'The Hunter and the Hunted'

IsQuestCompleted(70366) and not IsQuestCompleted(70367) and Core.Player.ClassLevel < 92

IsQuestCompleted(70369) and not IsQuestCompleted(70370) and Core.Player.ClassLevel < 98

If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(70369) and not IsQuestCompleted(70370) and Core.Player.ClassLevel > 97
IsQuestCompleted(70370) and not IsQuestCompleted(70371) and Core.Player.ClassLevel < 100

UserDialog.DialogText: Melee Role Quest - You must be 100 to take on the next quest 'A Hunter True'

If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(70370) and not IsQuestCompleted(70371) and Core.Player.ClassLevel > 99

UserDialog.DialogText: Please complete the solo duty manually.\nStand in the lines to prevent the NPC from dying. Make sure to do the ATM.

If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(70353) and not IsQuestCompleted(70360) and Core.Player.ClassLevel < 90

UserDialog.DialogText: Healer Role Quest - You must be 90 to take on the next quest 'In the Sting of Things'

IsQuestCompleted(70363) and not IsQuestCompleted(70364) and Core.Player.ClassLevel < 98

If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(70363) and not IsQuestCompleted(70364) and Core.Player.ClassLevel > 97
IsQuestCompleted(70364) and not IsQuestCompleted(70365) and Core.Player.ClassLevel < 100

UserDialog.DialogText: Healer Role Quest - You must be 100 to take on the next quest 'An Antidote for Anarchy'

If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(70364) and not IsQuestCompleted(70365) and Core.Player.ClassLevel > 99

UserDialog.DialogText: Please complete the solo duty manually.\nYour job is to keep Loashkana alive. Make sure to cast Esuna on you and the NPC when the duty tells you to.

If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(70376) and not IsQuestCompleted(70377) and Core.Player.ClassLevel > 99

UserDialog.DialogText: Please complete the solo duty manually.\nThe main mechanic is to hit the shielded mechs on the glowey side.

(IsQuestCompleted(&TankRoleQuest;) and IsQuestCompleted(&HealerRoleQuest;) and IsQuestCompleted(&MeleeRoleQuest;) and IsQuestCompleted(&PhysicalRangedRoleQuest;) and IsQuestCompleted(&CastingRoleQuests;)) and not IsQuestCompleted(70724)

UserDialog.DialogText: Please complete the solo duty manually
